title: Yahir's Evolving Thesis on AI Search & Distribution (2022–2026)
html:
A four-year arc tracing how Yahir went from "asking the right question will be the next best skill" (Oct 2022, weeks after ChatGPT launched) to a fully-architected white-label GTM for ai search optimization sold through marketing agencies (Jan 2026). This is the through-line his graph keeps coming back to.

The through-line

If you compress every founder-mode note in the corpus into one sentence, it reads like this: the value moves from the technician who builds the answer to the prompter who frames the question, and whoever owns the layer between brands and the answer engines wins distribution. That sentence is not stated anywhere outright — it has to be assembled across four years of journals, todos, and product specs. What follows is the assembly.

2022 — The seed: "asking the right question is the next best skill"

The earliest evidence sits in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream, the densest single note in the vault. Opened the day Yahir was listening to Ahmad Jamal and modified through August 2023, it stacks jazz, OSU coursework, crypto club decks, and — load-bearing for this thesis — a cluster of ChatGPT wedge ideas drafted weeks after the public launch. Yahir flags the customer-service wrapper as too obvious, then floats the dream app and a "talking Tom" advice giver styled as Steve Jobs / Jesus / Jay-Z. Sitting alongside those product seeds is the line that becomes the thesis's foundation: "asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" (asking the right question). Paired with "seek nonobvious things" (nonobvious), it forms the founder filter Yahir will run every subsequent idea through. The note also contains a PDX-agency hit-list (PixelSpoke, Vacasa, Rain the Growth, Above the Fray, etc.) — the first appearance of agencies as a distribution surface in his thinking, three years before rankett productizes that channel.

2023 — The wrapper era: "USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION"

2023 in the raw apple notes is where the thesis hardens into ideas-to-build. The May 2023 idea dump (2023-05-13-ideas in raw/apple-notes/) catalogues "AR for concerts," "AI girlfriends," tokenization of real-world assets — and crucially the line "so ai agency company" and "USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION — big time fleece and the noobs unfortunately wouldn't know." Two ideas planted in the same note that resurface as load-bearing in 2026: the AI-flavored agency, and the wrapper-as-leverage instinct. The July 2023 startup-advice note (Antonio Garcia Martinez–style maxims about monomaniacal founders enduring endless shit) is the headspace that prepares him to commit. 2023 is the "build something" impulse without yet a wedge — see the December 2023 note of the same name, which is mostly self-instructions about waking up at 8am and doing two hours of deep work.

2024 — China, disruption, BroMenu, and the OpenAI fork

2024 is two stories braided. First, the china chapter — six months in Shanghai, Chengdu, Xi'an — gives Yahir his cross-cultural pattern-matching muscle. The markers of development checklist (2024 08 31 determinants of advanced countries) and the "they embrace exclusivity" observation (2024 09 02 notes on the chinese) are him doing comparative anthropology in real time. The BroMenu spec he drafts the week he leaves China explicitly cites AliPay / WeChat QR-scan flows as UI inspiration — the China year flowing directly into product decisions. The closing manifesto (2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure) and the flight-out reflection (2024 12 14 departing china) crystallize the identity scaffolding (magnetic aura, soul as beacon, fitfo) he will need for the founder grind.

Second — and more directly — the May 2024 OSU finals dump contains the explicit fork. Yahir writes: "OpenAI announcement — This is appearing to be a monumental moment that may decide the future of what I do, idk??" In the same note he keeps a "decide on" menu (asset tokenization, disrupting wasteful human interfaces, smart-home integration, peer wager app) and a starred inventory of "mindless boring tasks irl" — parking attendants (4 stars), toll booths (5 stars), gym front-desk verifiers, retail cashiers — the literal job list he wants to dissolve into software. This is the lineage that runs straight to rankett and the : pick a wedge that uses LLMs to remove a human bottleneck.

2025 — Brotein, the Austin move, ISSA, and survival

2025 is the operational year. Brotein (the renamed BroMenu) is the active venture — codes, Supabase uploads, leaderboard, group share, TikTok content, "Brotein werun group" — running through 2025 05 30 todos. In parallel Yahir is paying for the ISSA personal trainer cert (the credential that will make the gym shift hireable), planning the Austin move that executes mid-September, and finishing public speaking remotely from OSU. Then 2025 09 23 how im scraping by lands: the inventory of bridge income strategies (overnight gym, DoorDash, $1.50/lb chicken thighs, fb marketplace flips, "good grace of my mom") and the no runway discipline line about getting mad at himself for a $5.50 horchata. This is the year voluntary adversity stops being a quote in a 2022 note and starts being lived.

2026 — Rankett, the GTM bible, and the category gets named

January 2026 is the inflection. The Rankett Meetup Prep Guide — the densest GTM articulation in the corpus — pulls every prior thread together into a single coherent product: a done-for-you white-label ai visibility engine sold only to marketing/SEO agencies with 5+ existing clients ($998/seat/month, agency resells at $3K–$6K, 60 day activation rule to filter tire-kickers). The category is finally named: ai search optimization, "prompts are the new keywords," visibility across chatgpt, anthropic claude, gemini, perplexity, grok, deepseek, google ai overviews. The architecture (ghost white label) and the moat (pooled data network effect) are stated explicitly. Six days later, 2026 01 13 rankett com catches Yahir grappling with a tweet that "fucked me up" — someone else publicly staking the claim he's been building privately — and asking himself "are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?" It is a textbook asking the right question move four years after the seed. The whitelabel strategy note hardens: "we whitelabel ai search optimization." Implementation surface area becomes schema markup for ai, llm txt, directory management across 50+ sites, with share of voice as the central scoring metric.

Where the thesis stands as of latest data

As of the 2026 04 25 admin alignment audit and the 2026-04-27 Rankett.com Google Doc (latest in the corpus), Rankett is the all-in bet — Memory frames it as "all my energy and time and future banking right now." The targets are sharp: $5K/month by late June 2026, $100K/month by EOY 2026, then quit the gym shift. The thesis has compounded: the 2022 instinct (asking-the-right-question + nonobvious + agencies-as-channel) is now a productized GTM with pricing, a filter, a moat story, and named category. What remains unproven is whether the pooled data network effect actually exists in product (vs only in the sales pitch) and whether the 5+ client filter scales fast enough to hit the $100K/mo line. But the through-line — the prompter wins, the agency is the wedge, distribution is the moat — is the most coherent story arc anywhere in the data.
